name: jellllly420-github-io-dev
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R node:node /home/node/.ssh && sudo chmod 700 /home/node/.ssh && sudo chmod 600 /home/node/.ssh/* 2>/dev/null; sudo chown -R node:node /home/node/.gnupg && sudo chmod 700 /home/node/.gnupg; sudo mkdir -p /home/node/.claude && sudo chown -R node:node /home/node/.claude; curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash; curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; npm install -g typescript-language-server
